# Thank you for contributing to Forever!

This project is not just about AI. It's about love, memory, and the people we lost and will never forget.

Please read our guidelines before contributing.

## Quick Links

- [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Security Policy](SECURITY.md)

## Quick Links for Contributors

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Issues](https://github.com/badhope/forever/issues) | Bug reports and feature requests |
| [Discussions](https://github.com/badhope/forever/discussions) | General questions and ideas |
| [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md) | Recent changes |

## Development Setup

```bash
git clone https://github.com/badhope/forever.git
cd forever
npm install
npm run typecheck
```

## Code of Conduct

This project adheres to the Contributor Covenant. By participating, you are expected to uphold this code.

---

> "To live in hearts we leave behind is not to die."
